title: Review: fix: jmap correctness and space/contact set fixes
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — two P0 correctness bugs found (Space/changes lying, name/description type not validated). Neither will corrupt data, but both violate the JMAP spec in ways clients will notice: Space/changes returns stale synthetic created[] lists; space_set accepts and silently drops type errors. One structural P1 risk: the is_simple_space_prop/Phase-2 match arm invariant is comment-only, guaranteeing a future breakage class.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: did not trace every call site of update_space_fully, did not review the Android MainActivity.kt change (17 lines, different layer), did not run integration tests against a real JMAP client. Would raise confidence if: a JMAP compliance test suite ran against the daemon, or the space_changes cannotCalculateChanges fix had a test (contact_changes does; space_changes doesn't).
